zh.Royden Hall, East Peckham, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Jane Johanna Clifton於1456年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾古斯納時，她的父親James Clyfton28歲，母親Alice Lancaster24歲。她於大約1474年與Thomas Roydon II在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1526年在英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Jane Johanna Clifton于1456年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾古斯納时，她的父亲James Clyfton28岁，母亲Alice Lancaster24岁。她于大约1474年与Thomas Roydon II在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1526年在英国英格兰肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Jane Johanna Clifton was born in 1456, in Goosnargh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Clyfton, was 28 and her mother, Alice Lancaster, was 24. She married Thomas Roydon II about 1474, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1526, in East Peckham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Jane Johanna Clifton est née en 1456, à Goosnargh, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Clyfton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Lancaster, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Roydon II environ 1474, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1526, à East Peckham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Johanna Clifton(이)가 1456년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 구스나르그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Clyfton(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Lancaster(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Thomas Roydon II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1526년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스트 펙함에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Jane Johanna Clifton родилась в 1456 г. в местности гуснарг, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Clyfton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Lancaster, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Roydon II около 1474 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1526 г. в местности эаст пеккхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.
